page_header.heading: A Digital Agency That Works Exclusively With Trade Businesses
page_header.sub: We don't serve every industry. We chose one — trades and services — and we've gone deep. Every tool, process, and piece of knowledge we have is built around helping Queensland trade businesses win more work online.

story.heading: Why We Focus Only on Trades
story.body_1: Most web agencies take any client who comes through the door — one week it's a café, the next a law firm, the next a plumber. They apply the same generic process to everyone and produce forgettable results for most.
story.body_2: Orbit Logic was built differently. We work exclusively with trade and service businesses across Queensland, which means everything we know — how trade customers search, what makes them trust a business, what causes them to pick up the phone — is directly applicable to you. There's no knowledge being wasted on other industries.
story.body_3: Our clients are concreters, landscapers, plumbers, electricians, painters, roofers, patio builders, and more. They share common problems: outdated or non-existent websites, unqualified leads wasting their time, and no reliable digital system for growing their enquiry pipeline. We fix all three.

values.heading: What You Get Working With a Trades-Only Agency
values.sub: Specialisation has a compounding effect. The more trade businesses we work with, the better we understand what works — and what doesn't. Here's what that means for you.

cards.heading: Deep Industry Knowledge
cards.body: We know Queensland trade customers — how they search, what they read, what builds trust, and what makes them click away. That knowledge is baked into every project we deliver.

cards.heading: Systems Thinking
cards.body: We don't just build websites. We design lead generation systems — because a beautiful website that doesn't convert is just an online brochure nobody reads.

cards.heading: Queensland Local Expertise
cards.body: Based in Queensland, we understand the local search landscape, seasonal demand patterns, and what it takes to outrank competitors in your specific service area.

cards.heading: Custom Work Only
cards.body: Every project is built from scratch. No templates, no recycled layouts, no one-size-fits-all solutions. Your business is specific — your website should be too.

cards.heading: Results-Focused
cards.body: We measure success by lead volume, conversion rate, and client growth — not just visual design. Your investment should show up in your enquiry inbox.

cards.heading: Long-Term Partnership
cards.body: We're not here for a one-off website project. Our goal is to be your ongoing digital partner — helping you grow as your business scales.

approach.heading: We Design for Trust — Because That's What Makes Trade Customers Enquire
approach.sub: When someone is choosing a trade business, they're inviting a stranger to their home or property. The decision is driven by trust above everything else. Our design process starts from that truth and works backwards.

cards.heading: Strategy Before Design
cards.body: Before any design work begins, we research your market, your competitors, and your ideal customers. Every visual and content decision is informed by that strategy — not personal preference.

cards.heading: Credibility-First Layouts
cards.body: Trade customers need to see proof before they enquire. Reviews, photos of completed work, credentials, and clear service details — our layouts put trust signals where they have the most impact.

cards.heading: Conversion Engineered In
cards.body: Clear calls-to-action, minimal friction in the enquiry process, and mobile-first design for customers browsing on their phones. Conversion isn't an afterthought — it's the entire brief.

cards.heading: Continuous Improvement
cards.body: A launch is the start, not the finish. We monitor performance data, track what's working, and improve your site over time — so it keeps getting better as your business grows.

process.heading: A Clear, Structured Process — So You're Never in the Dark
process.body_1: Managing a web project on top of running a trade business is stressful. Our process is designed to minimise your time investment while keeping you informed and in control at every stage.
process.body_2: From your first call to your first lead, you'll know exactly what's happening, what comes next, and when your site will be live.

steps.heading: Free Discovery Call
steps.body: A focused 30-minute conversation about your business, goals, ideal customers, and what your current digital presence is — or isn't — doing for you.

steps.heading: Strategy & Proposal
steps.body: We map out site structure, page priorities, copy direction, and any systems or solutions. You receive a clear, itemised proposal before a single line of work begins.

steps.heading: Design & Build
steps.body: Your project is built to spec with clear milestones, regular updates, and your review and approval before anything goes live. Typically 3–5 weeks from kick-off.

steps.heading: Launch & SEO Setup
steps.body: A careful, monitored launch with full on-page SEO configured, Google Analytics live, and a complete walkthrough so you understand what you have and how to use it.

steps.heading: Ongoing Partnership
steps.body: Monthly management, performance reporting, and continuous optimisation as your business grows — or a clean handover if you prefer to self-manage. No lock-in either way.

cta_banner.heading: Let's Have a Straight Conversation About Your Business
cta_banner.body: If you're a serious Queensland trade business looking for a partner who understands your market — book a free call. No fluff, no sales pressure. You'll leave with clarity on what's possible and what it takes to get there.
